overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt of Rivia exiting a candlelit tavern and walking through a medieval village at sunset. The character ascends a long stone staircase along timber-framed buildings to reach a scenic cliffside overlook with panoramic views of a misty valley and distant castle towers.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with wooden tables and candlelight

events.description: Geralt walks through the tavern doorway, transitioning from indoor to outdoor environment

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past seated villagers through the candlelit tavern toward the exit door

notable_agents.action: villager sitting at wooden table with candle and drink
woman in dress walking ahead toward the doorway

entered.detail: dark wooden plank walls illuminated by warm candlelight
rough wooden tables with candles and tankards
red and gold coat of arms banner hanging on wall
open wooden door frame leading to exterior

segments.scene_description: Inside a dimly lit medieval tavern, Geralt walks past villagers seated at wooden tables toward the exit. Warm candlelight illuminates the wooden plank walls and a heraldic banner hangs on the right as the character approaches the doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village square with thatched cottages at dusk

events.description: exits tavern into open village square with thatched-roof houses
approaching stone staircase at edge of village square

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the village square passing villagers and thatched-roof cottages

notable_agents.action: villager in dark cloak walking across the cobblestone path
woman in dress walking along wooden fence

entered.detail: traditional wattle and daub houses with straw roofs
village well with stone surround in the square
rough wooden picket fences lining the path
vibrant pink and orange sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the village square at dusk, Geralt walks across cobblestone paths past thatched cottages and wooden fences. Villagers walk through the square as the character approaches a stone staircase leading upward, with a vibrant pink sunset sky overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep stone staircase ascending alongside timber-framed building

events.description: begins ascending the long stone staircase alongside the building
sky becomes more visible and vibrant with sunset colors as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: Geralt climbs the steep stone stairs alongside a half-timbered building

notable_agents.action: villager descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide grey stone steps with wooden handrail on right
half-timbered house with dark wooden beams and plaster

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends a long stone staircase flanked by a stone wall on the left and a timber-framed building on the right. The sky becomes increasingly visible showing vibrant sunset colors as the character climbs higher, passing a villager descending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with panoramic valley views at sunset

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters open terrace with expansive views
approaching cliff edge reveals panoramic view of misty valley and distant castle

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the upper terrace approaching the scenic overlook of the valley

notable_agents.action: villager standing near wooden railing admiring the view

entered.detail: misty valley with distant forest, river, and rolling hills
tall stone tower with illuminated windows on distant hillside
stone wall at edge of drop-off overlooking valley
tall trees silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, Geralt emerges onto an open terrace with breathtaking panoramic views of a misty valley bathed in golden sunset light. The character walks along the cliff edge past a timber building now on the left, with a distant castle tower visible across the valley and the sky glowing with vibrant orange and pink hues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, candlelit interior of a medieval tavern to a sweeping, panoramic cliffside overlook at sunset. It begins inside the dimly lit tavern, moving past villagers and wooden plank walls toward the exit. As the character emerges into the village square, the environment opens up into a cobblestone path lined with thatched cottages under a vibrant pink dusk sky. The scene then shifts upward as the camera ascends a long stone staircase flanked by timber-framed buildings, with the horizon expanding as the climb continues. Finally, the movement culminates on an open terrace, where the view reveals a misty valley and distant castle towers bathed in glowing orange and golden sunset light.
